title: Shantipole (CR90 corvette)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] ''Shantipole''|the asteroid of the [[Shantipole|same name]]}}
'''''Shantipole''''' was a [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

''Shantipole'' was used to [[Battle of Roche (Galactic Civil War)|evacuate]] [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] personnel from the research facility on [[Research Station Shantipole|Shantipole]], in the [[Roche asteroid field|Roche asteroid belt]], when the [[Shantipole Project]] was compromised by the presence of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] spy. Given its name, it is likely this vessel was originally manufactured on or around the Shantipole asteroid.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''

*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
